rationale: All P0 criteria met with 100% coverage and 100% pass rate across 10 P0 acceptance criteria. No security issues (NFR-S2/S4 PASS). No critical NFR failures. Overall coverage 87% (exceeds 80% minimum). P1 coverage 87% (meets 80% minimum, below 90% target) — 2 P1 gaps: 1.6-AC3 (re-auth cycle only unit-tested in isolation) and 1.8-AC4 (two weak-assertion unit tests, E2E compensates). Both are non-critical with E2E/unit compensation. 3 skipped E2E tests are independently covered at unit/integration level. NFR-R1 (reliability) has CONCERNS (403 over-firing, cache delay) acceptable for pre-production MVP with waivers.
